name: Education (Zimbabwe)
definition: Private and independent providers of education and training: schools, colleges, early-childhood centres, tertiary institutions and skills-training providers.

subSectors.name: Vocational and skills training
subSectors.description: Trade, technical and professional training providers.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Established schools and colleges with boarding or multiple streams.
School groups and private tertiary institutions.

officialSizeThresholds.note: No official institution-size classification was verified from an official source in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design. School registration and accreditation regimes are declared as research gaps rather than described.
